scripts.test: npm run test:layout && npm run test:host-abi && npm run test:parser-state-abi && npm run test:wasm-modules-abi && npm run test:wasm-modules-loader && npm run test:bootstrap-lines && npm run test:wasm-modules && npm run test:wat && npm run test:watwat-probe && npm run test:assert-probes && npm run test:coverage-selftest && npm run test:cold-reload-index
scripts.test:watwat-probe: node tools/watwat.js --expect-failure probe_assert_eq_i32_failure "deliberate i32 failure" dist/wasm/watwat.test.wasm
scripts.coverage: npm run build:cov && npm run test:coverage
scripts.coverage:strict: npm run build:cov && npm run test:coverage:strict
